category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a framework for semantic web and linked data apps; official Apache Jena docs describe RDF, SPARQL, Fuseki, TDB, and related subsystems.
display_name_sources: Official website and documentation use the name 'Apache Jena'; source_facts.homepage is https://jena.apache.org/.
docs_sources: Official Apache Jena documentation overview at https://jena.apache.org/documentation/.
repo_sources: Official Apache Jena GitHub README says the active modules are in git at https://github.com/apache/jena.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions semantic web and linked data; official documentation lists RDF, SPARQL, Fuseki, TDB, and Java APIs.
